match.desc: We provide supporting services to improve your match experience. From equipment rental to professional documentation.

info.title: SERVICE INFORMATION
info.desc: The price list above is a standard reference for every match at Borneo Anfield Stadium. Please regularly check slot availability with our admin. To ensure smooth match operations, please book services at least H-2 before your match schedule starts.
